HomePage.title: Agent Workflow Hub
HomePage.hero_subtitle: Unlock the full potential of AI Coding Protocol. Reduce Token waste in your IDE powered by Google NotebookLM (RAG), letting your AI focus purely on the code.
HomePage.feature_1_desc: No more pasting long documents into IDE chats. Our protocol works with NotebookLM to retrieve project knowledge in real-time.
HomePage.feature_2_desc: Run AI locally with peace of mind. Featuring Symlink Hijacking Protection and automated Git Hooks to detect .env files.
HomePage.feature_3_desc: Switch between projects effortlessly. Folder-isolated auth allows you to use different Google Accounts per project without conflict.

ManualPage.title: Comprehensive Manual
ManualPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about setting up and using the AI Coding Protocol.
ManualPage.install_desc: Install the protocol and MCP server into your workspace.
ManualPage.auth_desc: Login with your Google account to enable NotebookLM access.
ManualPage.usage_desc: Use the following commands in your IDE chat to trigger the workflow.
